prompt: Create a wide cinematic anime nightscape in a 16:9 aspect ratio. A single young anime girl stands in the right third of the frame on a dark grassy hillside, shown from about mid-thigh up with her back partly turned and her face looking over her shoulder toward the viewer. She has very long flowing pastel pink hair, soft amber-pink eyes, a small shy smile, a curled ahoge strand, and a side bun tied near the back. She wears a dark gothic sleeveless dress in deep navy-black with thin straps, chain details down the back, black lace-like bands on her upper arms and hair, and long glossy royal blue opera gloves. The scene is illuminated by cool moonlight and faint violet rim light, giving her hair a luminous translucent glow. Behind her is an expansive starry sky over distant mountain silhouettes and a valley with tiny warm city lights. The sky should be the main subject: deep indigo-to-blue gradient, dense scattered stars, visible Milky Way-like nebula clouds in purple and cyan, and exactly 4 visible shooting stars: one bright diagonal meteor on the upper left, one bright diagonal meteor near the upper center, one faint diagonal meteor near the upper right-center, and one bright diagonal meteor left of the character near mid-sky. Foreground includes out-of-focus dark grass silhouettes along the bottom edge, with atmospheric depth and a subtle bokeh effect from the distant lights. Use highly polished anime illustration style blended with astrophotography-inspired realism, soft glow, delicate linework, rich contrast, dreamy romantic mood, and no text, watermark, borders, or extra characters. Customize the setting as quiet mountain overlook above a distant valley and the overall color palette as deep indigo, violet, cyan, and pale lavender.
